rows.label: tev055601_JNK0010

rows.label: tev055601_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Chacha about the Nopon.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055601_JNK0020

rows.label: tev055601_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Chacha about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055601_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask Chacha if he's heard any interesting rumors.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055601_SEL1011
rows.name: Ask Chacha about Mira.

rows.label: tev055601_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Chacha about recent developments.

rows.label: tev055601_SEL1041
rows.name: Ask Chacha if he's heard any interesting rumors.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055601_SEL2011
rows.name: Ask Chacha about the Growth's base.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055601_SEL2021
rows.name: Ask Chacha about recent developments.

rows.label: tev055601_SEL2031
rows.name: Ask Chacha about the Growth's base.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055601_MSG0001
rows.name:
Hoy! Friend wants information? Hmm...
Information of Chacha veeery expensive.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055601_MSG0002
rows.name:
But since Chacha going to be staying in city
of friend for while, only fair that Chacha
make special exception this one time.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055601_MSG0003
rows.name:
Nopon very wise race that live in caravans
around Mira. Nopon travel from caravans to
every corner of planet selling fabulous wares![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055601_MSG0004
rows.name:
Business sort of hurting these days
because of so many unexpected visitors...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055601_MSG0005
rows.name:
But gullib...uh, reliable friends like
humans fill all Nopon with newfound hope![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055601_MSG0010
rows.name:
Chacha come here just as soon as
Chacha catch wind of big new town.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055601_MSG0011
rows.name:
It turns out that human food is
delicious! Plus there are tons
of ways to make easy money.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055601_MSG0012
rows.name:
Everyone else in caravans should get
Nopon heinies over here lickety-split![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055601_MSG0013
rows.name:
Then Chacha can sell Nopon inside info
about city and REALLY rake it in![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055601_MSG0018
rows.name:
Does friend know human named
Vandham? Really big guy?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055601_MSG0019
rows.name:
According to sources of Chacha,
this Vandham fellow wants to sign
friendship treaty with Nopon.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055601_MSG0020
rows.name:
So why the holdup?! Friend is BLADE, right? Friend
should convince Vandham to get ball rolling so
Nopon are officially allowed to live here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055601_MSG0021
rows.name:
Then Chacha can sell Nopon inside info
about city and REALLY rake it in![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055601_MSG1001
rows.name:
Mo! Human friend very smart. Knows exactly
which Nopon to go to for answers![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055601_MSG1002
rows.name:
Chacha knows all about your FrontierNet.
It is big wonder machine for gathering
information about Mira, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055601_MSG1003
rows.name:
...Wrong! Compared to extensive
mental database of Chacha,
FrontierNet is only oversized toy.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055601_MSG1004
rows.name:
But lucky for friend, Chacha willing to part
with juiciest secrets of Mira for low, low
price of 1,000,000,000 credits. Such deals![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055601_MSG1005
rows.name:
...Mo? Friend cannot pay this entirely
reasonable sum? Such shame! Chacha ready
to throw in meaning of life for free, too...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055601_MSG1010
rows.name:
Thanks to new friendship
treaty, Nopon friends of Chacha
already pouring into city.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055601_MSG1011
rows.name:
Chacha able to point them at best restaurants
for modest price. Also provide business
advice for very reasonable commission.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055601_MSG1012
rows.name:
New Nopon so very eager to make
Chacha filthy stinking rich![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055601_MSG1013
rows.name:
Mo-mo! Chacha just LOVE new human
friends! Friendship treaties
like gifts that keep giving![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055601_MSG1014
rows.name:
Chacha better hurry up and find more info
to sell so cash flow stays healthy.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055601_MSG1019
rows.name:
Friend knows strange human person
named Eliza? She gives many speeches
in residential district.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055601_MSG1020
rows.name:
Mostly she talks about "equality" and
"freedom." Like those can be sold. Mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055601_MSG1021
rows.name:
But she still seems nice. Very trusting!
Chacha thinking she might buy information
for triple usual price.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055601_MSG1022
rows.name:
First Chacha need to find
suave approach. Suave approach
key to making huge coin![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055601_MSG2001
rows.name:
Chacha mobilizing best
informants in Cauldros to get
best scoops about continent.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055601_MSG2002
rows.name:
All Chacha need is one
mind-blowing piece of intel
to take business to new level![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055601_MSG2003
rows.name:
What BLADE heading to certain doom in Growth
stronghold would NOT pay 10,000,000,000,000
credits for shot at staying alive?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055601_MSG2004
rows.name:
No BLADE, says Chacha! Come back
soon and friend can be first
victi...uh, customer. Yes. Customer.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055601_MSG2010
rows.name:
Wise Chacha really gets around.
Visited many, many places on Mira.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055601_MSG2011
rows.name:
But Chacha never seen someone as willing
to put others before self as Eliza.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055601_MSG2012
rows.name:
Just other day, Chacha got picked on by young
and disagreeable human ruffian—but Eliza came
to rescue like Chacha her own family![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055601_MSG2013
rows.name:
Maybe Chacha not charge
Eliza for info anymore.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055601_MSG2014
rows.name:
...What? Chacha very GENEROUS? Mo-mo-mo! Friend
is sorely mistaken! Now Chacha got to charge other
friends more to make up for lost business.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055601_MSG2020
rows.name:
Nopon friends in Cauldros sending all
kinds of useful info back to Chacha.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055601_MSG2021
rows.name:
Market value must be 10,000,000,000,000
credits at least. Only one problem...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055601_MSG2022
rows.name:
Eliza worry about BLADEs going
into battle there, so she give
away best info for free.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055601_MSG2023
rows.name:
So here it is! First juicy info: Slavebird
Isle off coast of Cauldros has incredibly
delicious food called brambloo shoot![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055601_MSG2024
rows.name:
Second juicy info: Really bad idea to touch bullet
flies buzzing around cliffs above the Scholes
Battlegrounds. Friend will get hurt. Possibly dead.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev055601_MSG2025
rows.name:
...See? No longer profitable, but very useful
intel. BLADE friends are lucky Chacha has
such astoundingly reliable connections.[ST:wait ]
